name: auto-ppt-engine
description: Python-first AI-agent-ready PowerPoint workflow for planning, revising, validating, and rendering PPTX decks.

scripts.cli:generate:mock: ./auto-ppt generate --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI product strategy deck for executives in a professional tone"
scripts.cli:revise:mock: ./auto-ppt revise --mock --deck output/py-generated-deck.json --prompt "Compress this deck, make it more conclusion-driven, and emphasize the execution plan"
scripts.generate:prompt: python py-generate-from-prompt.py --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI product strategy deck for executives in a professional tone"
scripts.generate:mock: python py-generate-from-prompt.py --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI product strategy deck for executives in a professional tone"
scripts.generate:source: python py-generate-from-prompt.py --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI workspace strategy deck for executives" --source examples/inputs/sample-source-brief.md
scripts.py:generate:mock: python py-generate-from-prompt.py --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI product strategy deck for executives in a professional tone"
scripts.py:generate:source: python py-generate-from-prompt.py --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI workspace strategy deck for executives" --source examples/inputs/sample-source-brief.md
scripts.revise:mock: python py-revise-deck.py --mock --deck output/py-generated-deck.json --prompt "Compress this deck, make it more conclusion-driven, and emphasize the execution plan"
scripts.py:revise:mock: python py-revise-deck.py --mock --deck output/py-generated-deck.json --prompt "Compress this deck, make it more conclusion-driven, and emphasize the execution plan"
scripts.smoke:source: python py-generate-from-prompt.py --mock --prompt "Create an 8-slide AI workspace strategy deck for executives" --source examples/inputs/sample-source-brief.md
scripts.smoke:revise: python py-revise-deck.py --mock --deck output/py-generated-deck.json --prompt "Compress this deck, make it more conclusion-driven, and emphasize the execution plan"
